summary: Landing page website for 'Growth Byte Digital' digital marketing agency. Built with HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. Features navy blue/white/yellow color theme, smooth scrolling nav, hero section with CTA, services cards, about section, why choose us section, contact form with WhatsApp button, and footer. Support phone: 6265381119, support email: gbdigital@gmail.com. User has provided a logo image to incorporate.
architectural_notes: Single-page HTML/CSS/JS website — no frameworks or build tools
Color theme: Navy blue, white, and yellow
User provided a custom logo image to be used in the site
known_issues: Logo image not displaying correctly in navbar/footer
WhatsApp 'Chat on WhatsApp' button uses incorrect number — must use +916265381119
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Digital marketing themed background with abstract data/network lines, glowing nodes, and a dark navy-to-deep-blue gradient atmosphere, suitable for a full-screen hero backdrop (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png and display it in the navigation bar replacing any text-only agency name placeholder. The logo should be sized appropriately for a navbar (height ~48px) and also appear in the footer alongside the agency name text.
Update all instances of the support phone number to 6265381119 and support email to gbdigital@gmail.com across the ContactSection, Footer, and any other components that display contact information.

Save the uploaded Growth Byte Digital logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png (overwriting any existing file), then fix all components that reference this logo (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AboutSection.tsx) so the image renders correctly. Ensure the src attribute uses the correct relative public path '/assets/generated/logo.png', the alt attribute is set to 'Growth Byte Digital', the image has explicit height/width constraints appropriate for each context (height 48px in Navbar, height 60px in Footer, larger display size in HeroSection and AboutSection), and object-fit is set to 'contain' so the logo is never cropped or distorted.

Save the uploaded logo (logo__1_-removebg-preview.png) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png, overwriting any existing file. The image already has its background removed (transparent). Update all components that reference the logo (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AboutSection.tsx) to use src='/assets/generated/logo.png' with alt='Growth Byte Digital', object-fit contain, and the same dimension constraints already in place (height 48px in Navbar, height 60px in Footer, larger display in HeroSection and AboutSection).

In ServicesSection.tsx, replace the current card background/border colors with a distinct light color for each of the five service cards and the CTA card. Use a harmonious, well-combined light color palette (e.g., soft sky blue, mint green, peach, lavender, pale yellow, and light coral) ensuring sufficient contrast for text readability. Keep card typography, icons, and layout unchanged.

In HeroSection.tsx, set the hero section background to use the newly generated background image asset at '/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png' rendered at 45% opacity. The background image should cover the full section (object-fit: cover) while all existing text, logo, CTA buttons, and stats remain fully visible and unchanged in appearance.
In HeroSection.tsx, increase the logo image size slightly compared to its current dimensions. Keep object-fit: contain and maintain aspect ratio.

In HeroSection.tsx, locate and remove the large decorative circle element rendered in the center/middle area of the hero section. Remove only that decorative circle; do not alter any other layout elements.

In ContactSection.tsx, update the WhatsApp CTA button href to use the correct number +916265381119. The link should be formatted as 'https://wa.me/916265381119'. Update any hardcoded phone number references in this button or its surrounding text to reflect +91 6265381119.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update contact details: support phone 6265381119 and email gbdigital@gmail.com in the contact form/footer
Remove background from logo JPG to make it transparent, and change 'Our Services' section card box colors to light, well-combined colors
Set hero/background section to use uploaded image at 45% opacity, increase logo size slightly, remove the large decorative circle element, and fix WhatsApp button number to +91 6265381119
